description: Late letter in Judaeo-Arabic from Moshe ben Naʿim, Alexandria, to his brother David ben Naʿim, Cairo/Fustat. The copious blank space was reused for a literary work in Hebrew (Zohar? At least it seems mystical and quotes Rashbi).
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בכיא פריז.
